required_preferences.fact: Moves daily guided meditation to evenings after meetings due to early-morning European calls — no longer practices meditation first thing each morning

supersedes.fact: Starts every morning with a ten-minute guided meditation — never skips, even on weekends

required_preferences.fact: Temporarily replaces all cardio workouts with seated upper-body strength or flexibility routines — avoids jogging, brisk walks, cycling, or HIIT due to ankle fracture recovery

supersedes.fact: Increases cardiovascular activity by adding two additional workouts per week, such as cycling, HIIT classes, or brisk walks, on top of the usual jogging routine

required_preferences.fact: Explores Boston’s art museums and local coffee shops on weekends, seeking solo experiences in new neighborhoods
Organizes files and analyses in dedicated project folders — never leaves documents unnamed or in downloads
Prepares personal talking points and questions in advance for weekly cross-functional meetings to ensure her perspective is considered, since she is now on a larger, more complex team
Arranges weekend video chats during her usual social brunch time to stay connected with friends, since she cannot easily attend in-person gatherings while in a walking boot

persona: A recent MBA graduate specializing in business intelligence and analytics
